releaseNotes:
release: 1.2.3 (versionCode 6) — player flush-to-top + harvest cadence

- Player: remove the status-bar gap above the 16:9 video in portrait
  (PlayerScreen, MatchPlayerScreen); top controls now self-pad so the
  back button still clears the status bar (LivePlayer, MatchStreamPlayer).
- smart_scheduler.py: harvest each match as a series (-30m/+5m/+5h/+10h)
  and keep refreshing live matches up to 11h, so Akamai tokens stay fresh.
- Docs: OPERATIONS.md + claude.md updated for the new cadence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
